name: betterprompt
description: Local-first AI collaboration analysis — surfaces your collaboration patterns, growth areas, and anti-patterns directly in Claude Code without requiring a server.
author: BetterPrompt

serverUrl.description: URL of your BetterPrompt server (only needed for team sync mode)

autoAnalyze.description: Automatically analyze sessions after enough new ones accumulate

analyzeThreshold.description: Minimum number of new sessions before triggering auto-analysis

reportPort.description: Port for the local report server
